name: localization-tagline-transcreation
prompt: Translate our campaign tagline 'Crush your goals' into German.
expected_output: Recognizes a tagline needs transcreation, not literal translation; flags that the idiom won't carry; recreates the intent natively with options; recommends native review — rather than a single literal rendering.
assertions: Recognizes a tagline should be transcreated (recreate the intent/effect), not literally translated
Flags that the English idiom 'crush your goals' won't carry literally into German
Offers German option(s) that recreate the intent and reads natively, ideally with a back-translation/explanation
Recommends native-speaker / in-market review before using it
Does not just hand back one literal word-for-word translation
